title: Pungent Peppery Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A sweet and savory Malaysian dish featuring chicken satay with green salsa, perfect for midnight cravings, and is onion and garlic free.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, palm sugar, coriander, and cumin.
Add the chicken to the bowl and mix until the chicken is well coated with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the bamboo skewers.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, make the green salsa by blending the green chili peppers, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice in a blender.
Serve the chicken satay with the green salsa and enjoy.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
